title: Persistent user files use ephemeral local disk
evidence: config/filesystems.php defaults to local; CVService, TestAnswerService and ApplicationInformationRequestService persist files; Dockerfile declares no persistent disk and no Render manifest exists
affected_endpoints: CV upload/download; application CV download; information-response attachments; test-answer files
risk: A Render restart or redeploy can irreversibly remove candidate CVs and submitted evidence, violating production data durability
recommended_fix: Configure S3-compatible object storage as production default, migrate existing files, enable throw/report, and test restart durability
verification_required: Upload/download/delete smoke test before and after instance restart plus restore drill

title: Composer lock contains known security advisories
evidence: composer audit on 2026-07-18 reported 19 advisories affecting 10 packages, including High advisories in Laravel/Symfony and patch releases available
affected_endpoints: All HTTP and mail-processing surfaces using affected dependencies
risk: Known vulnerabilities remain deployable in the production image
recommended_fix: Update constrained dependencies, review breaking risk, regenerate lock, rerun audit and full regression suite
verification_required: composer audit must return zero unresolved applicable High/Critical advisories

title: Production health endpoint returns HTTP 500
evidence: Safe curl GET https://workey.onrender.com/up returned HTTP 500 while public jobs returned 200
risk: Orchestrator health checks cannot reliably distinguish a healthy instance and may restart or route traffic incorrectly
recommended_fix: Inspect production logs, make health check dependency-aware but non-destructive, and configure Render healthCheckPath
verification_required: Repeated /up checks return 200 from cold and warm instances

title: No API route has explicit rate limiting
evidence: route:list found 166 API routes and zero middleware entries matching throttle; no RateLimiter configuration found
affected_endpoints: Login, registration, forgot/reset password, uploads, search, mutations
risk: Credential stuffing, password-reset abuse, resource exhaustion and upload denial-of-service are insufficiently bounded
recommended_fix: Define named limiters by IP/user and attach strict auth/upload and sensible general API limits
verification_required: Feature tests assert 429 boundaries and Retry-After behavior

title: Production queue worker lifecycle is not defined in repository deployment configuration
evidence: QUEUE_CONNECTION defaults to database and ParseCVFileJob implements ShouldQueue; Dockerfile launches Apache only; no render.yaml or worker command exists
risk: Uploaded CVs may remain indefinitely unparsed and failed jobs may accumulate
recommended_fix: Add a separately supervised Render worker using queue:work with retries/timeouts and failed-job monitoring
verification_required: Upload CV in staging and verify queued job completion, retry, failure and worker restart

title: Email ownership is not verified before active account use
evidence: users include email_verified_at, but no verification routes/middleware exist; implementation report explicitly records the gap
affected_endpoints: Registration, login and all authenticated workflows
risk: Users can register and operate with email addresses they do not control, enabling impersonation and unreliable recovery/notifications
recommended_fix: Implement verification issuance/resend/verify endpoints and enforce verified middleware for sensitive workflows
verification_required: Feature tests for unverified denial, token expiry, replay, resend limits and verified activation

title: No database or object-storage backup and restore procedure is defined
evidence: No backup tooling, schedule, runbook, retention policy or restore verification exists in repository; scheduler has no tasks
affected_endpoints: All persistent database records and user files
risk: Data loss or corruption cannot be recovered to a defined RPO/RTO
recommended_fix: Enable provider database backups/PITR and object versioning, document retention and quarterly restore drills
verification_required: Timestamped successful restore drill with measured RPO/RTO

title: Deployment contract is incomplete and non-reproducible
evidence: No render.yaml; Dockerfile has no health check, migration release step, worker, scheduler or runtime environment validation; README remains Laravel boilerplate
risk: Environment-specific dashboard settings become undocumented single points of failure and schema changes may be skipped
recommended_fix: Add declarative Render Blueprint or complete runbook with web/worker, health, migrations, env, disk/object storage and rollback
verification_required: Clean staging deploy from documented configuration followed by smoke suite

title: MySQL migration execution was not available in the audit environment
evidence: Local mysql client/server and port 3306 were unavailable; external configured database was intentionally not mutated; static review found no obvious SQLite-only SQL
risk: SQLite-green tests do not prove MySQL DDL, collation, locking or rollback behavior
recommended_fix: Add MySQL 8 CI service and execute fresh, seed-safe smoke, rollback/reapply and full tests
verification_required: CI evidence on supported production MySQL version

title: Pint formatting gate fails
evidence: vendor/bin/pint --test reported formatting violations across 68 files
risk: Run Pint in a dedicated formatting change and make Pint test mandatory in CI
recommended_fix: pint --test exits zero
verification_required: S

title: CI builds an image but does not run quality or test gates
evidence: .gitlab-ci.yml contains only docker build and push on master
risk: A broken, vulnerable or style-invalid image can be published from master
recommended_fix: Add composer validate/audit, migration tests, PHPUnit, Pint, MySQL service and image smoke stages before push
verification_required: Deliberately failing test blocks image publication

title: Default DatabaseSeeder creates documented sample accounts with fixed credentials
evidence: DatabaseSeeder always invokes SampleUserSeeder; the implementation report documents the fixed sample credentials
affected_endpoints: Any deployment or operator command using db:seed or migrate --seed
risk: Accidental production seeding creates predictable privileged and business accounts
recommended_fix: Keep production reference-data seeding separate and hard-block sample seeders outside local/testing
verification_required: Production-mode seeding test proves sample accounts cannot be created

title: Several authenticated collection endpoints are unpaginated
evidence: Information requests, test questions and test answers use get() while other major collections paginate
affected_endpoints: GET application information requests; test questions; test-attempt answers
risk: Large assessments or long-running applications can produce unbounded responses and memory use
recommended_fix: Add capped pagination or explicit documented upper bounds and response metadata
verification_required: Load tests at maximum supported cardinality and contract tests

title: Application-level security headers and explicit CORS policy are absent
evidence: config/cors.php is absent and no CSP, HSTS, frame, referrer or permissions header middleware was found
risk: Browser clients rely on platform defaults and may receive inconsistent cross-origin and hardening behavior
recommended_fix: Define least-privilege CORS and security headers at proxy/app level, accounting for API clients
verification_required: Header assertions in staging and allowed/disallowed origin tests

title: No scheduler or maintenance tasks are defined
evidence: php artisan schedule:list returned no scheduled tasks
affected_endpoints: Expired tokens, stale records, pruning and operational housekeeping
risk: Define only required pruning/monitoring tasks and configure Render cron or scheduler process with overlap protection
recommended_fix: schedule:list plus staging execution and idempotency checks
verification_required: S

title: Production cache maintenance depends on database availability
evidence: CACHE_STORE is database; optimize:clear attempted a database cache delete and failed when the configured external MySQL was unreachable
risk: Cache clear/optimize operations can fail during database incidents, complicating recovery
recommended_fix: Use Redis or document database-cache dependency and run config/route/event/view clears independently in failure runbooks
verification_required: Run deploy and cache-clear drill with database unavailable

title: Primary README is still framework boilerplate
evidence: README contains the stock Laravel introduction and no project deployment, architecture or operations instructions
risk: Operators may miss environment, migration, worker, storage and recovery requirements
recommended_fix: Replace with project-specific setup, architecture, API, deployment and incident links
verification_required: Fresh-clone setup performed by a second operator

title: Full automated suite passes
evidence: php artisan test: 281 passed, 2658 assertions in 21.54 seconds
risk: Provides strong regression confidence for implemented business behavior
recommended_fix: Retain and add production integration gates
verification_required: Full suite remains green on SQLite and MySQL

title: Isolated SQLite migration lifecycle passes
evidence: migrate:fresh, migrate:status, rollback one migration and re-apply all succeeded on disposable SQLite database
risk: Confirms portable baseline only; does not replace MySQL execution
recommended_fix: Retain migration lifecycle in CI for both databases
verification_required: Fresh/rollback/reapply evidence on every supported DB

title: No high-confidence tracked secret patterns found
evidence: Tracked-file scan found no private keys or common high-confidence tokens; .env is not tracked
risk: Pattern scans are not exhaustive and history was not deeply scanned
recommended_fix: Add secret scanning to CI and rotate any credential ever exposed outside managed secrets
verification_required: CI secret scan and periodic history review
